content: Bun is a fast JavaScript all-in-one toolkit — runtime, bundler, transpiler, package manager
Bun implements Node.js APIs natively, not through V8 — uses JavaScriptCore (JSC) engine from WebKit
bun run script.ts — runs TypeScript directly without compilation step
Bun is 4x faster than Node.js for HTTP serving (measured with simple hello-world)
Bun is designed as a drop-in replacement for Node.js, but faster
Bun competes with both Node.js (runtime) and Deno (TS-first) by combining speed of native code with Node compatibility
